title: Certified Soft Skills Trainer
description: Comprehensive certification in soft skills training methodology, curriculum design, and delivery techniques for corporate and educational settings.

title: Training of Trainers (TOT)
description: Certified under the Training of Trainers program, qualifying to train and mentor fellow trainers in soft skills delivery and facilitation.

title: Government Training Projects
description: Authorized trainer for government-sponsored skill development and soft skills training projects across multiple states.

title: CSR Projects Certification
description: Certified trainer for corporate CSR initiatives focused on youth empowerment, digital literacy, and employability enhancement.

title: Mahindra Pride Classroom
description: Certified trainer for the Mahindra Pride Classroom program — a flagship initiative empowering underprivileged youth with employability skills.

title: Skill Bridge Program
description: Certified facilitator for the Skill Bridge Program, bridging the gap between academic education and industry-ready skills.
